release: Phase 3 — Hand Tracking and Drawing Engine
scope: Phase 1: foundation hardening — deterministic install/build, Vercel deployment contract, canonical metadata, cache discipline and local-first runtime policy.
Phase 2: premium visual system, RTL layouts, themes and mobile drawer refinement.
Phase 3: hand tracking reliability, pinch stability, drawing smoothness, camera isolation and fist continuity.
Phase 4: export, save, update, offline recovery, onboarding and privacy polish.
Phase 5: final QA, release package, README, screenshots and Termux deployment procedure.
privacy: Drawing data stays local unless the creator explicitly requests an export, share or AI generation.
releaseGate: npm run vercel:build confirms the local model, verifies UI source contracts, builds the self-hosted MediaPipe runtime and verifies generated deployment assets.
notes: v6.2.0 Phase 3 adds velocity-aware hand tracking, lower-latency drawing, pinch stability and a bounded continuity guard for closed-fist or short occlusion transitions.
